# Upstream Fork

This repository is an intentional public fork of `KelvinTegelaar/CIPP-API`, kept public to allow upstream sync with the original project.

The NeoTech-Networks default policy of all-private repositories does not apply to upstream forks of public open source projects; making this repo private would break the fork relationship and prevent pulling updates from upstream.

Source: https://github.com/KelvinTegelaar/CIPP-API
